data.title: Proact IT Group AB Appoints Nomination Committee for 2026 AGM
data.description:
Proact IT Group AB ( (SE:PACT) ) has provided an announcement.

Proact IT Group AB has appointed a Nomination Committee for its 2026 Annual General Meeting, as per the resolution of the previous meeting. The committee consists of representatives from the four largest shareholders by voting rights, with Länsförsäkringar Fondförvaltning stepping in as the fourth largest shareholder declined to appoint a representative. This move ensures continued stakeholder engagement and governance, potentially impacting the company’s strategic direction and shareholder relations.

The most recent analyst rating on (SE:PACT) stock is a Hold with a SEK103.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Proact IT Group AB stock, see the SE:PACT Stock Forecast page.

More about Proact IT Group AB

Proact IT Group AB is a leading specialist in data and information management, focusing on cloud services and data centre solutions across Europe. The company helps customers enhance agility, productivity, and efficiency by managing data storage, connectivity, protection, and security. Founded in 1994 and listed on Nasdaq Stockholm in 1999, Proact serves over 4,000 customers globally, managing hundreds of petabytes of information with a workforce of more than 1,200 employees in 12 countries across Europe and North America.

Average Trading Volume: 57,297

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: SEK2.39B

data.title: ARKO Corp Appoints Jordan Mann as Interim CFO
data.description:
An announcement from ARKO Corp ( (ARKO) ) is now available.

On October 3, 2025, ARKO Corp., a Delaware corporation, announced the appointment of Jordan Mann as the interim Chief Financial Officer, effective October 10, 2025. Mann, who is also the Senior Vice President of Corporate Strategy, Capital Markets, and Investor Relations, will temporarily replace Robert Giammatteo. Mann’s compensation package includes a base salary of $350,000 and stock units vesting over three years, reflecting the company’s strategic approach to leadership transitions.

The most recent analyst rating on (ARKO) stock is a Hold with a $5.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ARKO Corp stock, see the ARKO Stock Forecast page.

The earnings call provided a mixed outlook, with positive initiatives offset by declining sales and EBITDA. The technical analysis suggests potential bearish momentum, and the high P/E ratio indicates overvaluation.

data.title: Haiki+ S.p.A. Appoints New Independent Director Amidst Strategic Focus on Circular Economy
data.description:
Haiki+ S.P.A. ( (IT:HIK) ) just unveiled an update.

Haiki+ S.p.A. announced the appointment of Dr. Giovanni Grazzini as an independent director, replacing Prof. Eugenio D’Amico, who resigned due to other commitments. This change in the board of directors highlights the company’s commitment to maintaining strong governance as it continues to position itself as a leader in the circular economy sector in Italy.

More about Haiki+ S.P.A.

Haiki+ S.p.A. is an investment holding company listed on the Euronext Growth Milan market, focusing on the Environment and Circular Economy sector. The company operates through four divisions, aiming to be a leading player in Italy’s circular economy by effectively valorizing various waste categories and utilizing a range of treatment, recovery, and recycling plants. With over twenty years of experience, Haiki+ serves as a hub of circularity, leveraging diversified skills, technological innovation, and strategic management of production waste.

data.title: Azimut Exploration Unveils Major Lithium Discovery in Quebec
data.description:
An announcement from Azimut Exploration ( (TSE:AZM) ) is now available.

Azimut Exploration Inc. has announced a significant high-grade lithium discovery at its Wabamisk East Property in the James Bay region of Quebec. The discovery, made through a systematic field program, reveals a large-scale system of spodumene pegmatites with promising lithium grades, indicating potential for further exploration and development. The project, part of an option agreement with Rio Tinto Exploration Canada Inc., is advancing towards the drilling stage, with Azimut proposing an aggressive exploration program for early 2026. This discovery could enhance Azimut’s positioning in the lithium market, potentially impacting stakeholders and the regional mining landscape.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AZM) stock is a Hold with a C$0.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Azimut Exploration stock, see the TSE:AZM Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:AZM Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:AZM is a Neutral.

Azimut Exploration’s overall stock score reflects a mixed financial performance with significant profitability challenges, neutral technical indicators, and a concerning valuation due to negative earnings. However, positive corporate events, including strategic partnerships and expansions, provide a potential for future growth and improvement in market position.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:AZM stock, click here.

More about Azimut Exploration

Azimut Exploration Inc. operates in the mining and exploration industry, focusing primarily on the discovery and development of mineral resources. The company is engaged in projects that explore for lithium, gold, and other valuable minerals, with a significant emphasis on properties in Quebec, Canada.

data.title: Ermenegildo Zegna to Announce Q3 2025 Revenues
data.description:
Ermenegildo Zegna ( (ZGN) ) has shared an announcement.

On October 9, 2025, Ermenegildo Zegna N.V. announced it will release its unaudited revenues for the third quarter of 2025 on October 23, 2025. The announcement will be followed by a conference call and webcast, providing stakeholders an opportunity to engage with the company’s financial disclosures. This upcoming release is significant for stakeholders as it offers insights into the company’s recent financial performance and market positioning.

To see Spark’s full report on ZGN stock, click here.

More about Ermenegildo Zegna

Founded in 1910 in Trivero, Italy, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group is a global luxury company specializing in high-end menswear. The company operates through three complementary brands: ZEGNA, Thom Browne, and TOM FORD FASHION, catering to various segments within the luxury fashion industry. Known for its unique Filiera, the company integrates Italian textile production with luxury manufacturing to ensure superior quality and innovation. As of 2024, the Ermenegildo Zegna Group employed over 7,100 people and reported revenues of €1.95 billion.

data.title: Crypto Company Acquires Majority Stake in Starchive
data.description:
Crypto Company ( (CRCW) ) has provided an announcement.

On October 3, 2025, The Crypto Company entered into a Subscription Agreement with White Dwarf LLC to sell 10,000,000 shares of its common stock for 0.437411 BTC. Additionally, on October 8, 2025, TCC announced a Securities Purchase Agreement to acquire 50.1% of Starchive, a digital asset management platform. This acquisition, expected to close by October 17, 2025, involves a combination of cash, equity, and debt, and aims to enhance TCC’s blockchain capabilities and market positioning by integrating Starchive’s platform, which facilitates content monetization and management for creators.

More about Crypto Company

The Crypto Company (TCC) is a publicly traded entity operating at the intersection of traditional and decentralized finance. It focuses on building, acquiring, and investing in businesses across crypto, blockchain, AI, and emerging technologies to drive large-scale adoption. TCC also manages a Digital Asset Treasury, holding tokens that are believed to have both financial and strategic value.

Current Market Cap: $20.67M
